creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
try to edit some file
'ee /some/file'

as output you get command shortcuts at top (as normal)
and then your file content are overlapped by 'ee' internal messages

How-To-Repeat: doing 'ee /etc/fstab' you get:
==========                   ===========
/dev/line 1 col 0 lines from
/dev/ada0s1b none swap sw 0 0

instead of:
/dev/ada0s1a / ufw rw 1 1
/dev/ada0s1b none swap sw 0 0
